rules.rule: Use logging instead of print() for any output in library code.
Use the structured error response helpers (terminal_error, transient_error) from slop_studio.errors instead of raising bare Exception or returning ad-hoc error dicts.
Public functions should have type hints for parameters and return values.
All I/O must be async. Use httpx.AsyncClient, not requests or other blocking HTTP clients. Never call synchronous blocking functions in async code paths.
